title: Exline's Fishing
description: This mod adds new fish to catch!
body:
[![Logo](https://img1.wsimg.com/isteam/ip/b3784fc8-73a8-4ed5-9033-feb6c6f2806c/blob-19e676c.png/:/rs=w:149,h:149,cg:true,m/cr=w:149,h:149/qt=q:95)](https://exlinemods.com/)

Explore Exline Mods for top-notch gaming accessories and mods. Elevate your gaming experience with our high-quality products. Visit exlinemods.com now to gear up and enhance your gameplay!

# Exline's Fishing
This mod adds new fish to catch! There are several new fish to be caught, but some can only be found in the ocean and others in rivers. Based on the fish in Animal Crossing games, each has a description from one of the games. There are also some trash items you might catch and need to throw away, however some of it may be recyclable... Hope you have fun catching all the new fish!

You can eat the fish, but some are not so edible. There will be cooked versions added in the future and possibly more.

## Fish

Anchovy, Angelfish, Arapaima, Arowana, Barbel Steed, Barred Knifejaw, Bass, Bitterling, Bluegill, Brook Trout, Carp, Catfish, Cherry Salmon, Coelacanth, Crawfish, Crucian Carp, Dab, Dace, Eel, Freshwater Goby, Frog, Giant Catfish, Giant Snakehead, Goldfish, Guppy, Horse Mackerel, Jellyfish, Killifish, Koi, Large Bass, Large Char, Loach, Lobster, Marlin, Octopus, Olive Flounder, Pale Chub, Piranha, Pond Smelt, Popeyed Goldfish, Rainbow Trout, Red Snapper, Sea Bass, Seahorse, Small Bass, Squid, Stringfish, Sweetfish

## Trash

Boot, Empty Can, Old Tire
